manifests.title: List running processes
manifests.description: Collect normalized process rows with CPU, memory, PID, parent PID, and command metadata.

manifests.title: Top CPU processes
manifests.description: Rank processes by CPU usage.

manifests.title: Top memory processes
manifests.description: Rank processes by working set memory.

manifests.title: Process details by PID
manifests.description: Return merged process details for one PID.

manifests.title: Process details by name
manifests.description: Return merged process details for one exact process name.

manifests.title: Process tree by PID
manifests.description: Build a parent-child tree around one PID.

manifests.title: Process executable path
manifests.description: Return the executable path for matching processes.

manifests.title: Process command line
manifests.description: Return command-line text when available.

manifests.title: Process count
manifests.description: Count running processes after filters are applied.

manifests.title: Duplicate process names
manifests.description: Detect process names that appear more than once.

manifests.title: Long-running processes
manifests.description: Find processes that have been alive for a long time.

manifests.title: Likely idle heavy processes
manifests.description: Flag processes with high memory use and low CPU.

manifests.title: Process risk classification
manifests.description: Classify candidate processes using protected and helper heuristics.

manifests.title: Dry-run kill process by PID
manifests.description: Preview what would be killed for a PID.
usage_examples: dry run kill process by pid

manifests.title: Kill process by PID
manifests.description: Terminate a process by PID using a guarded action.
safety_notes: You do not have explicit approval for a mutation.

manifests.title: Dry-run kill process by name
manifests.description: Preview what would be killed for an exact process name.
usage_examples: dry run kill process by name

manifests.title: Kill process by name
manifests.description: Terminate processes by exact image name using a guarded action.
safety_notes: You do not have explicit approval for a mutation.

manifests.description: Summarize the OS version and build information.

manifests.title: Live counter snapshot
manifests.description: Capture a current performance counter snapshot.

manifests.description: Compare live system metrics against warning thresholds.
